name: development-workflow
description: Create approved requirements and plans, automatically continue their session routing handoff, implement bounded changes, or govern AGENTS rules.

interface.shortDescription: Create PRDs, plans, routed prompts, bounded changes, and AGENTS rules.
interface.longDescription: Create approved product requirements and technical specifications, produce reviewed plans, automatically continue into three-state session routing and copyable handoff prompts, implement explicitly approved bounded changes, or govern evidence-backed AGENTS rules with explicit per-diff approval.
defaultPrompt: Automatically continue an approved PRD through planning and session routing, or run a bounded change or AGENTS rule review.
